---
title: "DI-2021 @ KDD 2021: 10 Papers + 5 Posters Accepted"
description: "10 accepted papers and 5 posters for the 2nd Document Intelligence Workshop at KDD 2021."
author: "synesis"
date: "2021-07-10"
categories: [NLP, conference]
image: cover.jpg
---

![DI-2021 accepted papers. Image from [DI workshop](https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2021/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Announcing 10 accepted papers and 5 posters for the 2nd Document Intelligence Workshop @ KDD2021! <https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2021/papers/> <https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2021/>

We have a jam-packed program too! <https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2021/program/>

The DI2021 Organizing Committee wishes to express its sincere gratitude to the help from our paper reviewers. Without your thorough and timely reviewing, we could not have organized a successful workshop! THANK YOU! <https://document-intelligence.github.io/DI-2021/organization/#reviewers>

Program committee (alphabetical): Doug Burdick, Dave Lewis, Yijuan Lu, Hamid Motahari, Sandeep Tata
Chair: Benjamin Han


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_kdd2021-di2021-documentintelligence-activity-6819535176281014272-lyZo).*
